title: Project Miner Local Import Exception Decision Register Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local Import Exception Decision Register panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Source and Exception Detail, six derived register items, item order, status pills, summary counts, dynamic behavior, export behavior, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local Import Exception Decision Register panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the existing import-exception-register id and Local import exception decision register aria label.
Keep the exception register panel inside Source and Exception Detail.
Preserve the register's six derived items, item order, status pills, summary counts, dynamic behavior, export behavior, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, and operating-queue disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible exception-register items, unchanged item count, absence of exception-register disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 094 recommended PM Lane 095 as Local Import Exception Decision Register Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration exception-register ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 096 scout and recommended Workflow Gates Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page import-exception-register panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open import-exception-register disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No exception register item label change.
No exception register item order change.
No exception register item count change.
No exception register status pill change.
No exception register summary count behavior change.
No exception register dynamic behavior change.
No exception register export behavior change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
